global_description: A medium-sized aquatic bird with a streamlined, elongated body and a sharp, pointed bill. It has a distinctive black and white checkered pattern on its back and wings, with a smooth, glossy black head and neck. The underparts are white, and the eyes are red.

part_details.head: Smooth, glossy black with a sleek appearance.
part_details.back: Checkered pattern of black and white, creating a distinctive grid-like appearance.
part_details.wings: Covered in a similar checkered pattern as the back.
part_details.bill: Sharp, pointed, and slightly upturned, grayish in color.
part_details.eyes: Bright red, standing out against the dark head.

spatial_relations: The neck extends smoothly from the head to the body.
The checkered wings are positioned laterally on the body.
The bill projects forward from the face.
